title: The Seventh Guest at Stillwater Manor
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: Six strangers invited to a remote Scottish manor for a reclusive author's will reading find a seventh guest dead in a locked study with a page of an unpublished manuscript pinned to their chest.
long_description: Six strangers invited to a remote Scottish manor for a reclusive author's will reading find a seventh guest dead in a locked study with a page of an unpublished manuscript pinned to their chest.
